2604.03144.title: InCoder-32B-Thinking: Industrial Code World Model for Thinking
2604.03144.paper_summary: Industrial software development across chip design, GPU optimization, and embedded systems lacks expert reasoning traces showing how engineers reason about hardware constraints and timing semantics. In this work, we propose InCoder-32B-Thinking, trained on the data from the Error-driven Chain-of-Thought (ECoT) synthesis framework with an industrial code world model (ICWM) to generate reasoning traces. Specifically, ECoT generates reasoning chains by synthesizing the thinking content from multi-turn dialogue with environmental error feedback, explicitly modeling the error-correction process. ICWM is trained on domain-specific execution traces from Verilog simulation, GPU profiling, etc., learns the causal dynamics of how code affects hardware behavior, and enables self-verification by predicting execution outcomes before actual compilation. All synthesized reasoning traces are validated through domain toolchains, creating training data matching the natural reasoning depth distribution of industrial tasks. Evaluation on 14 general (81.3% on LiveCodeBench v5) and 9 industrial benchmarks (84.0% in CAD-Coder and 38.0% on KernelBench) shows InCoder-32B-Thinking achieves top-tier open-source results across all domains.GPU Optimization
2604.03144.paper_summary_zh: 工業軟體開發涵蓋晶片設計、GPU 優化和嵌入式系統，但缺乏顯示工程師如何推理硬體限制和時序語義的專家推理痕跡。在這項工作中，我們提出了 InCoder-32B-Thinking，該模型基於來自錯誤驅動思維鏈（ECoT）合成框架的數據，並結合工業代碼世界模型（ICWM）來生成推理痕跡。具體而言，ECoT 通過綜合多輪對話中的思考內容和環境錯誤反饋來生成推理鏈，明確建模錯誤修正過程。ICWM 基於來自 Verilog 模擬、GPU 分析等的領域特定執行痕跡進行訓練，學習代碼如何影響硬體行為的因果動態，並通過在實際編譯之前預測執行結果來實現自我驗證。所有合成的推理痕跡都通過領域工具鏈進行驗證，創建與工業任務的自然推理深度分佈相匹配的訓練數據。在 14 個通用基準（在 LiveCodeBench v5 上達到 81.3%）和 9 個工業基準（在 CAD-Coder 上達到 84.0% 和在 KernelBench 上達到 38.0%）的評估顯示，InCoder-32B-Thinking 在所有領域中均達到了頂級的開源結果。GPU 優化
2604.03144.author: Jian Yang et.al.
2604.03144.authors: Jian Yang, Wei Zhang, Jiajun Wu, Junhang Cheng, Tuney Zheng, Fanglin Xu, Weicheng Gu, Lin Jing, Yaxin Du, Joseph Li, Yizhi Li, Yan Xing, Chuan Hao, Ran Tao, Ruihao Gong, Aishan Liu, Zhoujun Li, Mingjie Tang, Chenghua Lin, Siheng Chen, Wayne Xin Zhao, Xianglong Liu, Ming Zhou, Bryan Dai, Weifeng Lv
